examples: Delicacy is the key. Deliciously full-bodied with a perfect balance, all with an acidity finely controlled by a few hints of frangipane.
If Justice Frangipane's team and iDevices have their way, that clunkiness will be a distant memory.
The only real challenge is getting the case produced, as Frangipane is looking for crowdfunding to make the FlipSide a reality.
